title: Our Platforms
subtitle: Technology solutions that transform the way you do business

penny.name: PENNY
penny.title: PENNY
penny.shortDescription: Intelligent automation that learns and continuously improves your processes.
penny.description: Intelligent automation that learns from your processes and continuously improves, making your team more productive.

enclii.name: Enclii
enclii.title: Enclii
enclii.shortDescription: Our own PaaS powering MADFAM's entire infrastructure. GitOps-native, Kubernetes-based.
enclii.description: Sovereign cloud platform with zero-config deploys, preview environments, and built-in observability. Powers every MADFAM product in production.

janua.name: Janua
janua.title: Janua
janua.shortDescription: Self-hosted identity platform with SSO, MFA, and Passkeys. Open source (AGPL-3.0).
janua.description: Enterprise identity platform with SSO, SCIM provisioning, MFA, and Passkeys. The authentication layer for every MADFAM product.

yantra4d.name: Yantra4D
yantra4d.title: Yantra4D
yantra4d.shortDescription: Web platform for parametric OpenSCAD models with instant 3D previews and STL export.
yantra4d.description: Upload parametric designs, get instant 3D previews, export STL files. Powers 40+ open-source parametric designs in the commons.
